{
  "communicative_function": "declaring a personal commitment to realistic behavioral change while rejecting ineffective alternatives",

  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; draws a clear, logically consistent contrast between actionable steps and vague intentions",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker must subsequently define and consistently perform the specific small changes referenced",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement functions only as aspirational rhetoric without corresponding follow-through actions"
}
